title: vault · WAL-Backed KV Store
subtitle: Weeks 1–2: Write-Ahead Log from Scratch
description: Implement an append-only log with checksums, recovery on startup, and log compaction via snapshotting. The durability core of PostgreSQL.

title: pgpool · TCP Connection Pool
subtitle: Weeks 3–4: Like PgBouncer, But Yours
description: Maintain a fixed pool of backend connections, parse pgwire protocol, and implement transaction vs session modes for database scaling.

title: relay · WebSocket Clustered
subtitle: Weeks 5–6: Distributed and Clustered
description: Extend WebSocket server with Redis pub/sub fan-out, distributed presence heartbeat, and message history via Redis Streams.

title: resolver · DNS Resolver
subtitle: Weeks 7–8: Recursive, from Raw UDP
description: Build a recursive DNS resolver from scratch studying binary DNS message format, UDP sockets, and TTL caching.

title: lsm · Storage Engine
subtitle: Weeks 9–10: The Write Path of RocksDB
description: Implement MemTable, SSTables, Bloom filters, and compaction. Converts random disk I/O into sequential writes for extreme performance.

title: herald · Notification Service
subtitle: Weeks 11–12: Multi-Channel and Reliable
description: Build a reliable fan-out architecture for Email, SMS, and Push notifications with idempotency, retries, and DLQs.

title: gatekeeper · OTP Gateway
subtitle: Weeks 13–14: Multi-Tenant Auth Primitive
description: Implement a production-grade OTP verification service with multi-tenant namespaces and hashed ephemeral storage in Redis.

title: switchboard · API Gateway
subtitle: Weeks 15–16: Edge Security & Routing
description: JWT RS256 verification, sliding window rate limiting via Redis Lua, circuit breakers, and streaming request proxying.
